= KubeCompare Results
include::_attributes.adoc[]
:profile: 5g-ran-lab

Below you can find the kubecompare results for a SNO configured during this lab.

The following deviations are expected:

* PTP: We are in a virtual environment, hardware time stamping is not possible. We had to configure the policy to use software time stamping instead. There is a warning in the lab advising this is not supported.
* Subscriptions: We use the channels for 4.19 release and an install strategy automated rather than manual.
* SriovNetworkNodePolicy: We add three extra parameters for the NICs.
* Missing CRs:
.. StorageLV.yaml: Expected since we use LVMs Operator.
.. StoragePV.yaml: Expected since we use LVMs Operator.
.. DisconnectedICSP.yaml: Expected since we use ImageDigestMirrorSet.

[console-input]
[source,bash,subs="attributes+,+macros"]
-----
**********************************

Cluster CR: machineconfiguration.openshift.io/v1_MachineConfig_01-disk-encryption-rebind-master
Reference File: optional/machine-config/01-disk-encryption-pcr-rebind-master.yaml
Description:
  https://docs.openshift.com/container-platform/4.19/scalability_and_performance/telco_ref_design_specs/ran/telco-ran-ref-du-components.html#telco-ran-machine-configuration_ran-ref-design-components
Diff Output: diff -u -N /tmp/MERGED-1076456548/machineconfiguration-openshift-io-v1_machineconfig_01-disk-encryption-rebind-master /tmp/LIVE-2149626097/machineconfiguration-openshift-io-v1_machineconfig_01-disk-encryption-rebind-master
--- /tmp/MERGED-1076456548/machineconfiguration-openshift-io-v1_machineconfig_01-disk-encryption-rebind-master  2025-09-12 09:52:35.049507266 -0400
+++ /tmp/LIVE-2149626097/machineconfiguration-openshift-io-v1_machineconfig_01-disk-encryption-rebind-master    2025-09-12 09:52:35.050507265 -0400
@@ -35,13 +35,9 @@
         mode: 493
         path: /usr/local/bin/hwupgrade-detection-methods/ostree.sh
       - contents:
-          source: data:text/plain;charset=utf-8;base64,
+          source: data:text/plain;charset=utf-8;base64,
         mode: 493
         path: /usr/local/bin/hwupgrade-detection-methods/talm.sh
-      - contents:
-          source: data:text/plain;charset=utf-8;base64,IyBUaGlzIHVuaXQgZW5zdXJlcyB0aGF0IGNvbnRhaW5lcnMgc3RheSB1cCBvbiBzaHV0ZG93biB1bnRpbCB0aGUgcGNyLWRpc2FibGUtc2h1dGRvd24gc2VydmljZSBpcyBhYmxlIHRvIHJ1biAKW1VuaXRdCkJlZm9yZT1wY3ItZGlzYWJsZS1zaHV0ZG93bi5zZXJ2aWNlCg==
-        mode: 420
-        path: /etc/systemd/system/crio-.scope.d/order.conf
     systemd:
       units:
       - contents: |
@@ -59,8 +55,8 @@
           [Service]
           Type=oneshot
           RemainAfterExit=true
+          ExecStart=/usr/bin/true
           ExecStop=/usr/local/bin/disablePcrOnRebootOrShutdown.sh
-
           [Install]
           WantedBy=multi-user.target
         enabled: true

**********************************

Cluster CR: ptp.openshift.io/v1_PtpConfig_openshift-ptp_du-ptp-slave
Reference File: optional/ptp-config/PtpConfigSlave.yaml
Description:
  https://docs.openshift.com/container-platform/4.19/scalability_and_performance/telco_ref_design_specs/ran/telco-ran-ref-du-components.html#telco-ran-ptp-operator_ran-ref-design-components
Diff Output: diff -u -N /tmp/MERGED-2303766593/ptp-openshift-io-v1_ptpconfig_openshift-ptp_du-ptp-slave /tmp/LIVE-920166726/ptp-openshift-io-v1_ptpconfig_openshift-ptp_du-ptp-slave
--- /tmp/MERGED-2303766593/ptp-openshift-io-v1_ptpconfig_openshift-ptp_du-ptp-slave     2025-09-12 09:52:35.034507284 -0400
+++ /tmp/LIVE-920166726/ptp-openshift-io-v1_ptpconfig_openshift-ptp_du-ptp-slave        2025-09-12 09:52:35.034507284 -0400
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
   profile:
   - interface: enp4s0
     name: slave
-    phc2sysOpts: -a -r -n 24
+    phc2sysOpts: -r -n 24 -s /dev/ptp0
     ptp4lConf: |
       [global]
       #
@@ -62,7 +62,8 @@
       summary_interval 0
       kernel_leap 1
       check_fup_sync 0
-      clock_class_threshold 7
+      #clock_class_threshold 7 -> we use threshold 248 since GM doesn't have a GPS source
+      clock_class_threshold 248
       #
       # Servo Options
       #
@@ -95,7 +96,7 @@
       clock_type OC
       network_transport L2
       delay_mechanism E2E
-      time_stamping hardware
+      time_stamping software
       tsproc_mode filter
       delay_filter moving_median
       delay_filter_length 10
@@ -110,7 +111,7 @@
       manufacturerIdentity 00:00:00
       userDescription ;
       timeSource 0xA0
-    ptp4lOpts: -2 -s
+    ptp4lOpts: -2 -s -A --clientOnly=1 --step_threshold=0.1
     ptpSchedulingPolicy: SCHED_FIFO
     ptpSchedulingPriority: 10
     ptpSettings:

**********************************

Cluster CR: observability.openshift.io/v1_ClusterLogForwarder_openshift-logging_instance
Reference File: required/cluster-logging/ClusterLogForwarder.yaml
Description:
  https://docs.openshift.com/container-platform/4.19/scalability_and_performance/telco_ref_design_specs/ran/telco-ran-ref-du-components.html#telco-ran-logging_ran-ref-design-components
Diff Output: diff -u -N /tmp/MERGED-855752900/observability-openshift-io-v1_clusterlogforwarder_openshift-logging_instance /tmp/LIVE-1958822530/observability-openshift-io-v1_clusterlogforwarder_openshift-logging_instance
--- /tmp/MERGED-855752900/observability-openshift-io-v1_clusterlogforwarder_openshift-logging_instance  2025-09-12 09:52:34.986507344 -0400
+++ /tmp/LIVE-1958822530/observability-openshift-io-v1_clusterlogforwarder_openshift-logging_instance   2025-09-12 09:52:34.986507344 -0400
@@ -11,17 +11,33 @@
     type: openshiftLabels
   managementState: Managed
   outputs:
-  - kafka:
-      url: null
+  - loki:
+      labelKeys:
+      - log_type
+      - kubernetes.namespace_name
+      - kubernetes.pod_name
+      - openshift.cluster_id
+      url: https://logging-loki-openshift-logging.apps.hub.5g-deployment.lab/api/logs/v1/tenant-snos
     name: loki-hub
-    type: kafka
+    tls:
+      ca:
+        key: ca-bundle.crt
+        secretName: mtls-tenant-snos
+      certificate:
+        key: tls.crt
+        secretName: mtls-tenant-snos
+      insecureSkipVerify: true
+      key:
+        key: tls.key
+        secretName: mtls-tenant-snos
+    type: loki
   pipelines:
   - filterRefs:
     - ran-du-labels
     inputRefs:
-    - audit
     - infrastructure
-    name: all-to-default
+    - audit
+    name: sno-logs
     outputRefs:
     - loki-hub
   serviceAccount:

**********************************

Cluster CR: performance.openshift.io/v2_PerformanceProfile_openshift-node-performance-profile

Description:

Diff Output: diff -u -N /tmp/MERGED-2560563716/performance-openshift-io-v2_performanceprofile_openshift-node-performance-profile /tmp/LIVE-3646692258/performance-openshift-io-v2_performanceprofile_openshift-node-performance-profile

+++ /tmp/LIVE-3646692258/performance-openshift-io-v2_performanceprofile_openshift-node-performance-profile      2025-09-12 09:52:34.981507350 -0400
@@ -2,6 +2,10 @@
 kind: PerformanceProfile
 metadata:
   annotations:
+    kubeletconfig.experimental: |
+      {"topologyManagerScope": "pod",
+       "systemReserved": {"memory": "3Gi"}
+      }
     ran.openshift.io/reference-configuration: ran-du.redhat.com
   name: openshift-node-performance-profile
 spec:
@@ -14,6 +18,7 @@
   cpu:
     isolated: 4-11
     reserved: 0-3
+  globallyDisableIrqLoadBalancing: false
   hugepages:
     defaultHugepagesSize: 1G
     pages:

**********************************

Cluster CR: tuned.openshift.io/v1_Tuned_openshift-cluster-node-tuning-operator_performance-patch
Reference File: required/node-tuning-operator/TunedPerformancePatch.yaml
Description:
  https://docs.openshift.com/container-platform/4.19/scalability_and_performance/telco_ref_design_specs/ran/telco-ran-ref-du-components.html#telco-ran-node-tuning-operator_ran-ref-design-components
Diff Output: diff -u -N /tmp/MERGED-4105110402/tuned-openshift-io-v1_tuned_openshift-cluster-node-tuning-operator_performance-patch /tmp/LIVE-1136608905/tuned-openshift-io-v1_tuned_openshift-cluster-node-tuning-operator_performance-patch
--- /tmp/MERGED-4105110402/tuned-openshift-io-v1_tuned_openshift-cluster-node-tuning-operator_performance-patch 2025-09-12 09:52:34.984507346 -0400
+++ /tmp/LIVE-1136608905/tuned-openshift-io-v1_tuned_openshift-cluster-node-tuning-operator_performance-patch   2025-09-12 09:52:34.984507346 -0400
@@ -9,6 +9,9 @@
       [main]
       summary=Configuration changes profile inherited from performance created tuned
       include=openshift-node-performance-openshift-node-performance-profile
+      [sysctl]
+      # When using the standard (non-realtime) kernel, remove the kernel.timer_migration override from the [sysctl] section
+      # kernel.timer_migration=0
       [scheduler]
       group.ice-ptp=0:f:10:*:ice-ptp.*
       group.ice-gnss=0:f:10:*:ice-gnss.*

**********************************

Cluster CR: sriovnetwork.openshift.io/v1_SriovNetworkNodePolicy_openshift-sriov-network-operator_virt-enp5s0
Reference File: required/sriov-operator/SriovNetworkNodePolicy.yaml
